# Openable.dev

> Openable.dev is a beta desktop application for running AI-generated projects locally without installing Node.js, using terminal commands, or configuring a development environment.

Openable.dev helps non-technical users import AI-generated code through GitHub, install dependencies automatically, run the app locally, and open the project in Cursor for editing.

Key facts:

- Product category: desktop developer tool
- Audience: creators and non-technical users working with AI-generated code
- Supported project sources: Lovable, Bolt, v0, and other AI code generation platforms that can export projects to GitHub
- Core workflow: connect GitHub, import a repository, let Openable install dependencies, run locally, edit in Cursor
- Current status: beta
- Current platform: macOS, with Linux and Windows planned
- Created by: Wunderlabs

## Official Resources

- [Website](https://openable.dev): Product overview, beta signup, and current platform information.
- [Sitemap](https://openable.dev/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of public website URLs.

## Source

- [Openable GitHub repository](https://github.com/wunderlabs-dev/openable): Public source repository for the Openable application.
